name: ExtensionOrganization_Qualification
title: R5: Qualifications, certifications, accreditations, licenses, training, etc. pertaining to the provision of care (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Organization.qualification` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Organization.qualification` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Organization.qualification` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Organization.qualification` has a context of Organization based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Organization`.
Element `Organization.qualification` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: An identifier for this qualification for the organization
